commands_run: cd form/form-kernel-rust && cargo fmt --check && cargo build --release && python3 test_serve.py
failure_reason: Loosened the non-Form fanout boundary without promoting unproven routes. Rust and Go bridges now stamp fanout responses and upstream requests with native invitation headers that name Form/BML route recipe, selected path fanout-python, native_invitation_declined, and X-Form-Python-Fallback. Router-owned headers are filtered from client and upstream traffic so the bridge decision cannot be clobbered, while response body/status semantics remain unchanged.
